0.name: Colin
0.text: I still don’t understand how boxes keep multiplying around this dorm.

1.name: Colin
1.text: And somehow I keep ending up moving all of them.

2.name: Colin
2.text: Today was about force and motion...

3.name: Colin
3.text: The heavier something is, the harder you need to push it.

5.name: Colin
5.text: Honestly, Physics makes way more sense when someone lets me do things instead of stuffing formulas into my brain.

6.name: Colin
6.text: That Perry guy is still awkward, though.

7.name: Colin
7.text: I ask one question and he answers like he’s buffering.

8.name: Colin
8.text: "Shy mushroom" really is the perfect nickname for him.

12.name: Colin
12.text: Next week, we will finally start real committee work.

13.name: Colin
13.text: This is definitely going to end with me carrying more boxes.
